nasb.text: In the six hundredth year of Noah’s life, in the second month, on the seventeenth day of the month, on the same day all the fountains of the great deep burst open, and the floodgates of the sky were opened.

esv.text: In the six hundredth year of Noah’s life, in the second month, on the seventeenth day of the month, on that day all the fountains of the great deep burst forth, and the windows of the heavens were opened.

cnv.text: 挪亞六百歲那一年，二月十七日那一天，所有大淵的泉源都裂開了，天上的窗戶都敞開了。

ccb.text: 挪亚六百岁那年的二月十七日，所有深渊的泉源都裂开了，天上的水闸也打开了，

csbs.text: 挪亚六百岁那年的二月十七日，巨大深渊的泉源在那一天都裂开了，天上的窗户也敞开了——
